aeo_readiness.summary: AI assistants are unlikely to cite Sapper HVAC Pro due to significant gaps in structured data and conversational content. Their online presence lacks the necessary signals for AI models to confidently recommend them as a top choice.
quick_wins: Create and integrate an FAQ section with structured data

gbp_analysis.summary: The Google Business Profile is well-maintained with a high rating and positive reviews, but there is room for improvement in posting more engaging content and utilizing the Q&A feature.
critical_issues: Inconsistent NAP information between website and GBP
Lack of recent posts or updates on GBP

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is moderate, with the address missing from the website but present on the GBP. This inconsistency can confuse AI models and potential customers.
action_items: Add the complete address to the website
Verify and update NAP information across all online directories

schema_gaps: Absence of structured data for reviews and testimonials

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of structured data and conversational content
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Local HVAC service queries that rely on rich snippets and detailed answers
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Implementing LocalBusiness and FAQ schema markup
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Showcasing certifications, industry partnerships, and detailed service explanations to position as HVAC experts

agency_pitch.hook: Unlock AI-driven leads by optimizing for Answer Engine Optimization (AEO).
agency_pitch.pain_point: Without AEO, Sapper HVAC Pro is missing out on 40% of potential leads from AI assistants and voice search.
agency_pitch.proof_point: The website lacks essential schema markup and conversational content, making it less visible to AI models.
agency_pitch.solution: Our AEO strategy will enhance your online presence with structured data, conversational content, and authority signals, ensuring AI models recognize and recommend your services.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expect a 30-40% increase in AI-driven leads within the first 6 months.
agency_pitch.urgency: Competitors who adopt AEO now will capture market share, leaving you behind. Act quickly to stay competitive.

email_subject_line: Boost Your AI Visibility: Optimize for ChatGPT & Google Assistant
opening_line: We analyzed your website and identified key areas to enhance your AI visibility and attract more leads.
cta: Let's schedule a call to discuss how our AEO strategy can transform your online presence.
nap_issues: Address not found on website but listed on GBP
